holdings.infoBox: BKMC is an equity ETF with a total of 408 individual holdings. The top holdings are Revolution Medicines stock at 0.72%, Twilio at 0.69%, Carpenter Technology at 0.68%, nVent Electric at 0.68%, and ATI Inc. at 0.65%.

overview.description: The BNY Mellon US Mid Cap Core Equity ETF (BKMC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Solactive GBS United States 400 index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of US mid-cap companies. The index includes 400 companies, following the first 500 included in the Solactive GBS United States 1500 Index. BKMC was launched on Apr 9, 2020 and is issued by BNY Mellon.

data.title: BNY Announces ETF Share Splits
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--BNY Mellon ETF Investment Adviser, LLC today announced that five of their ETFs will undergo forward share splits at a ratio of 3-for-1. A forward share split increases an ET...
